name: FiveM + txAdmin (2026)
author: pterodactylhub@gmail.com
description: FiveM is a modification framework for GTA V, enabling you to play multiplayer on customized dedicated servers. Includes txAdmin web management panel with auto-update support.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl wget xz-utils
cd /mnt/server

# Download latest FiveM server artifacts
ARTIFACT=$(curl -s https://changelogs-live.fivem.net/api/changelog/versions/linux/server | jq -r '.latest')
wget -O fx.tar.xz "https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${ARTIFACT}/fx.tar.xz"
tar xf fx.tar.xz
rm fx.tar.xz

echo "FiveM ${ARTIFACT} installed successfully."

variables.name: txAdmin Port
variables.description: The port for the txAdmin web interface. Usually 40120.

variables.name: License Key
variables.description: Your FiveM license key from keymaster.fivem.net
